pi_items.source: 2015 ESC Guidelines for the diagnosis and management of pericardial diseases; American Society of Echocardiography (ASE) Clinical Recommendations

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic CT data (case_id: pericardial_001). The evaluation metrics for quantification are a maximum thickness error of 3.0 mm, a maximum volume error of 30%, and a minimum Dice coefficient of 0.4. Clinical severity thresholds for grading the effusion are: Small (<10mm), Moderate (10-20mm), and Large (>20mm), consistent with ESC and ASE guidelines.
